testcase.name: test_pdpyras
testcase.error: .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/_pytest/python.py:507: in importtestmodule mod = import_path( .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/_pytest/pathlib.py:587: in import_path importlib.import_module(module_name) /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/importlib/__init__.py:126: in import_module return _bootstrap._gcd_import(name[level:], package, level) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1204: in _gcd_import ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1176: in _find_and_load ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:1147: in _find_and_load_unlocked ??? <frozen importlib._bootstrap>:690: in _load_unlocked ??? .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/_pytest/assertion/rewrite.py:197: in exec_module exec(co, module.__dict__) test_pdpyras.py:25: in <module> import pdpyras E File "/Users/nelsonmbigili/Desktop/Spring 2026/Software Analysis/migratelib-artifact/repos/pagerduty@pdpyras__a4b14c5c__requests__pycurl/pdpyras.py", line 45 E def endpoint_matches(endpoint_pattern: str, method: str, path: str) -> bool: E ^^^ E IndentationError: expected an indented block after function definition on line 42
